title: baileya multiradiata
intro: Baileya multiradiata, also known as the paper daisy or desert marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Baileya multiradiata lie in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis. Baileya multiradiata can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing its flowers in hot water, or it can be used in a salve or ointment to apply topically.
